steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit passes through the y-intercept at approximately (0, 10) and extends to approximately (8, 4) on the right side of the graph. These are clear reference points visible on the grid.

steps.title: Apply the slope formula
steps.content:
Use the slope formula with the two points (0, 10) and (8, 4):
$$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{4 - 10}{8 - 0} = \frac{-6}{8} = -0.75$$
The slope is negative (line descends left to right) and has a magnitude of about 0.75. Among the choices, −0.84 is the closest value. That matches choice B — B is correct.
